title: Demand & Supply Opportunity Map

dataSources.name: Domestic university application share by field (Student Interest Signals / Dept of Education)
CRICOS course net change by broad field (CRICOS dashboard)
ACU commencing enrolments by field (Student Interest Signals)

notes: Joins domestic demand momentum (application share by ASCED broad field) against international-register supply momentum (CRICOS net course change) to map fields as Open / Hot / Crowded / Fading, with an ACU-portfolio overlay. Demand and supply are different markets (domestic vs international register) — read directionally. CRICOS all-levels supply is VET-dominated; the higher-ed cut is the university lens.
